dialogue_summary: The purpose of the dialogue is to explore research directions and personal approaches to PhD studies, with an emphasis on networking and resource management.

outcomes.description: Clarification on thinking versus acting in research context

actions.action_text: Asks for clarification about what the other meant
actions.evidence_quote: haha like what?
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: States they are usually a person who does the bare minimum of thinking and more actions
actions.evidence_quote: I am usually a person with bare minimum thinking and more actions
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Explains that thinking is grounded with actions
actions.evidence_quote: (thinking is grounded with actions)
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Agrees with the previous speaker
actions.evidence_quote: Agreed haha
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: Admits not being good at long-term thinking while acting
actions.evidence_quote: but i'm not good at thinking in long term while i act sth so
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: Comments that the topic is interesting
actions.evidence_quote: interesting,
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Expresses curiosity
actions.evidence_quote: I am curious
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Asks for clarification on what 'just to think' means
actions.evidence_quote: what does that mean (just to think)?
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Acknowledges the previous turn
actions.evidence_quote: Ohh so
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: Reports having received an interesting quote from Chenglei Si and feeling they should have known it earlier
actions.evidence_quote: maybe I have mentioned it, but one interesting quote I got from Chenglei Si, which I feel I should have known it way earlier is that
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Observes that when working for conference deadlines and focusing on specific RQs they sometimes move toward local minima
actions.evidence_quote: When i work for the conf deadline, as i'm focusing on specific RQs i feel like sometimes i'm going toward local minima
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: Describes Chenglei's approach to choosing a PhD direction and lists his three criteria
actions.evidence_quote: he think about what he wanted to do for the whole PhD it starts (the AI ideation thing). His criterion was: (1) something he cares about and he will be happy if it becomes true even not from his hand; (2) it is impactful enough with many ppl care about and it is something within his reach; (3) can not be solved in the near future
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Expresses surprise at learning this
actions.evidence_quote: I was so surprised
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Explains that this approach made his work and effort very focused
actions.evidence_quote: but this makes his work and effort very focuses.
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Reports that he earned his reputation from this approach
actions.evidence_quote: Also, he earned his name out of it.
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Says that chatting with top PhD students is fun.
actions.evidence_quote: so chat with the best PhD students are indeed fun.
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Expresses desire to find someone optimistic about the field to chat with.
actions.evidence_quote: I want to find someone who are optimistic to this field and chat..
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: Reports that most people they recently met had a negative view.
actions.evidence_quote: Haha mostly everyone I met recently had negative view
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: States optimism about the field (NLP).
actions.evidence_quote: I am optimistic about the field (NLP?)
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: States lack of optimism about academia.
actions.evidence_quote: just not optimistic about academia
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

outcomes.description: Plan to think about research approach

actions.action_text: Expresses a need for time to think
actions.evidence_quote: I need time to just think lol
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: States an intention to continue thinking about it
actions.evidence_quote: I want to keep thinking about
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: States that they sometimes want to stop working and just think
actions.evidence_quote: So i sometimes want to stop working and just think haha
actions.speaker: Eunsu

outcomes.description: Develop understanding of model aspirations in the field

actions.action_text: States what they want the models to be in the field and what type of research might be needed
actions.evidence_quote: What i want the models to be in this field what type of research might be needed etc
actions.speaker: Eunsu

actions.action_text: Suggests chatting with directors at Samsung or LG to learn their thoughts on PhD outside academia.
actions.evidence_quote: I can tell it is similarly fun if you chat with some directors at Samsung or LG to learn about their thoughts of PhD outside of PhD stratosphere
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Admits they are not a successful one.
actions.evidence_quote: I am not a successful one
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: States they studied the placement and trajectory of many PhD students before starting.
actions.evidence_quote: I have studied the placement and trajectory of many PhD students before I start.
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Advises not to expect sufficient resources from the department.
actions.evidence_quote: you should never expect enough resource from the department.
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao

actions.action_text: Advises bringing one's own resources to a PhD rather than assuming limited resources.
actions.evidence_quote: You should bring your resource to your PhD, not work under the assumption of limited resource, like the hunter of the tribe
actions.speaker: Xinran (Vodka) Zhao
